title: Totem No Shading
description: Renders Totem of Undying items at full brightness, that is, unaffected by lighting and directional shading.
body:
![A bizzare scene dramatically lit at dawn focusing on an Armor Stand equipped with Totem of Undying items, visibly brighter than its surroundings, than on Vanilla Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jgJRnsI7/images/27979adba8985f313bd04acb1a9b2f9317810620.png)

---

   **Totem No Shading** is a simple Minecraft mod that removes [directional shading](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shading) and block and sky lighting effects to **[Totem of Undying](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Totem_of_Undying)** items. Holding totems in either hands, worn on head (through commands), or on the ground will render said items to **full brightness**.

   Totem No Shading is a subset of <abbr>[Simply No Shading](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-no-shading) (SNS)</abbr>, concepts and technologies thereof aided in realizing this mod. The creation of [issue 119 for <abbr title="Simply No Shading">SNS</abbr> at Github](https://github.com/StartsMercury/simply-no-shading/issues/119) requests supporting selective application, specifically the Totem of Undying item; at that time there was no clear way to implement this. After <abbr title="Simply No Shading">SNS</abbr>' entity shading now exiting its experimental phase, the aforementioned issue was reconsidered and now released as its separate mod, **Totem No Shading**.
